covid_surveillance.short_description: Weekly covid surveillance data from New York State Department of Health
covid_surveillance.long_description: New York State Department of Health collects and reports covid surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

influenza_surveillance.short_description: Weekly influenza surveillance data from New York State Department of Health
influenza_surveillance.long_description: New York State Department of Health collects and reports influenza surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

ny_dph.name: New York State Department of Health
ny_dph.organization: New York State Department of Health
ny_dph.description: New York State Department of Health provides weekly respiratory surveillance data for New York covering pathogens including: covid, influenza . Data is published via state health department dashboards and reports. Temporal coverage: ~2019-ongoing. Geographic coverage: state level.
ny_dph.restrictions: Public domain state government health data.
